name: Nocturne FX
short_description: Fast, unforgiving, and endlessly replayable, Nocturne FX™ turns every run into an arcade showdown for your best score.
detailed_description:
Built entirely in JavaFX, Nocturne FX™ starts simple, but the skies do not stay calm for long. Chaos builds with every action as brutal speed, unpredictable power-ups that can save you or sabotage you, and shifting rules demand constant adaptation.

Pure arcade action built for the modern era. Fast, punishing, and endlessly replayable, every run is a test of focus and reflexes. Learn the patterns, adapt on the fly, and chase that one perfect score that always feels just out of reach.
